gaps: Most direct agent-skill evidence is from 2026 preprints and has not matured into broad peer-reviewed consensus.
The sweep used retrieved metadata and abstracts; no human-approved full-text acquisition, screening, or extraction acceptance occurred.
Results from SWE-Skills-Bench, SkillsBench, cybersecurity-skill corpora, or adversarially generated skills may not transfer to Pi, this model mix, or this repository.
No local paired task benchmark currently proves which pi-package-goal skills improve outcomes versus the same agent without a skill.
The local section audit is a heading/phrase heuristic; it can miss equivalent anchors written under different names and should not be treated as a compliance verdict.
The all-sources sweep timed out after 25 of 28 queries and produced substantial off-topic source noise; the focused four-source scholarly sweep completed all 28 queries.
Semantic Scholar rate-limited 20 of 28 focused queries; OpenAlex, Crossref, and arXiv completed all 28.
OSS search-plan output is discovery guidance only; no repository was cloned, security-reviewed, license-approved, or recommended for integration.
human_gates: Any third-party skill import or package integration
